ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus where the course is offered */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "syllabus_url" TEXT /* URL to the course syllabus */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is offered online */,
  "is_hybrid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is a hybrid (both online and in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "dean_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dean of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus where the venue is located */,
  "is_accessible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the venue is accessible for students with disabilities */,
  "has_projector" INTEGER /* Indicates if the venue has a projector */,
  "has_whiteboard" INTEGER /* Indicates if the venue has a whiteboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "is_tenured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the instructor is tenured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course schedule */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the course */,
  "duration_weeks" INTEGER /* Number of weeks the course runs */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the course is held */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the course is held */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus where the course is scheduled */,
  "is_cancelled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course has been cancelled */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation */,
  "rescheduled_date" TEXT /* New date if the course is rescheduled */,
  "rescheduled_time" TEXT /* New time if the course is rescheduled */,
  "rescheduled_venue_id" INTEGER /* New venue ID if the course is rescheduled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study of the student */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus where the student is enrolled */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course schedule */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the student in the course */,
  "attendance_percentage" INTEGER /* Attendance percentage of the student in the course */,
  "is_audit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student is auditing the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES course_schedules ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that requires a prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course requirement */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., co-requisite) */,
  "requirement_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the required course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_requirements_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_requirements_requirement_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student making the inquiry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the inquiry is about */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date the inquiry was made */,
  "inquiry_text" TEXT /* Text of the inquiry */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the inquiry was responded to */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Response to the inquiry */,
  "responded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who responded to the inquiry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_inquiries_responded_by FOREIGN KEY ("responded_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_inquiries_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_inquiries_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
